driver_subject: mtd: rawnand: atmel: Annotate struct atmel_nand with __counted_by
stage1_reason: Addition of __counted_by attribute annotation to flexible array member for GCC/Clang bounds-checking implementation
stage2_reason: Driver commit adds __counted_by annotation to struct atmel_nand, which directly implements the __counted_by macro introduced in kernel commit dd06e72e68bc for bounds-checking. The driver migration (v6.6->v6.7) follows the kernel commit's introduction (v6.5), aligning with the stage-1 reason about GCC/Clang bounds-checking implementation.
